eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Santa Barbara, CA; at 10:35 AM on JAN 15, 2019 Effective until 11:20 AM. Message from SBCOEM.
extra_text: The Santa Barbara County Sheriff's Office has issued an EVACUATION ORDER beginning at 10:00 AM today (Tuesday, January 15, 2019) due to the approach of a rainstorm capable of producing debris flows in Santa Barbara County below the Sherpa, Whittier and Thomas Fire burn areas (west of Goleta, Montecito, and Carpinteria). If you are in a storm risk area below a burn area, leave now. For more information or to view the interactive evacuation map, go to ReadySBC.org. Stay tuned for further instructions.
